list.question: Is the game in Early Access?
list.answer: No the game is currently in an earlier state of development called Playtest.

list.question: When will the game be released / made available for Early Access?
list.answer: There is no fix date yet but the plan is to start Early Access in summer 2026.

list.question: Can I already play the game?
list.answer: Yes, the game can be played during public Playtests. You can go to the Steam Page and join the Playtest.

list.question: Will there be a wipe?
list.answer: There will be a wipe before the start of the Early Access. No other wipes are planned.

list.question: Can I reset my stats / skills?
list.answer: Yes, the Waybinder NPC in Nevaris next to the Waypoint offers free stat and skill resets.
